title: Fed CBDC Set to Be Banned Until 2031 Under Housing Law Provision
dek: A statutory ban on a Federal Reserve central bank digital currency until 2031 is set to take effect at midnight under a housing law provision. Coverage indicates the measure becomes law regardless of a presidential signature. The development is independently covered by CoinDesk and Decrypt.
author: The Crypto Cronkite desk
key_fact: A statutory ban on a Fed CBDC until 2031 takes effect at midnight under a housing law's CBDC limit.
body: A statutory ban on a Federal Reserve central bank digital currency (CBDC) until 2031 is set to take effect at midnight, tied to a provision within a housing law, according to CoinDesk.
Decrypt reports the CBDC ban becomes law even without a presidential signature.
The provision represents a notable constraint on U.S. monetary-policy options regarding a digital dollar over the coming years.
